summary: Recent updates to the media sink component of Firefox focus on improving the handling of audio playback. The integration of **MOZ_LOG_FMT** will enhance the logging capabilities within the media sink, making it easier for developers to diagnose issues related to audio streaming and playback. Additionally, by removing dependence on **TaskQueue::IsEmpty()** during the initialization of the *AudioSinkWrapper*, the process will become more efficient and reliable. These changes aim to improve audio performance and stability, ultimately providing a better listening experience for users.
